_comment: Templates de hooks Claude Code par stack. Le skill bootstrap selectionne et adapte les hooks selon le projet.

typescript.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '\.tsx?$'; then cd {{PROJECT_ROOT}} && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -30; fi

python.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then python3 -c "import py_compile, sys; py_compile.compile(sys.argv[1], doraise=True)" "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" 2>&1 | head -10; fi

go.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '\.go$'; then cd {{PROJECT_ROOT}} && go vet ./... 2>&1 | head -20; fi

rust.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '\.rs$'; then cd {{PROJECT_ROOT}} && cargo check 2>&1 | head -30; fi

typescript_commit_blocker.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_COMMAND" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then cd {{PROJECT_ROOT}} && ! grep -rn 'console\.log' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' src/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v '// keep' | head -5 || (echo 'BLOCKED: console.log found in source files. Remove them before committing.' && exit 1); fi
typescript_commit_blocker.description: Block commits with console.log in TS source

python_commit_blocker.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_COMMAND" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then cd {{PROJECT_ROOT}} && ! grep -rn 'except:$\|except: pass' --include='*.py' {{SRC_DIR}}/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 || (echo 'BLOCKED: bare except or except:pass found. Add proper error handling.' && exit 1); fi
python_commit_blocker.description: Block commits with bare except in Python source

python_pytest.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then cd {{PROJECT_ROOT}} && python3 -m pytest tests/ -x --tb=short -q 2>&1 | tail -15; fi
python_pytest.description: Run pytest after Python edit (optional, heavier)

typescript_build.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '\.tsx?$'; then cd {{PROJECT_ROOT}} && npx next build 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
typescript_build.description: Build check after TS edit (optional, heavier)
